data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Veteran status tracking', which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the existence or functionality of this tracking feature. The absence of such evidence indicates a clear gap in meeting the requirement for veteran status tracking.
gaps: No evidence of implemented veteran status tracking.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
